title: agropyron boreale subsp. scandium
intro: Agropyron boreale subsp. scandium, also known as Scandian green bentgrass, is a subspecies of grass that is native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Scandian green bentgrass include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and providing antioxidant support. Herbal preparations of Scandian green bentgrass can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a variety of ways to harness its medicinal properties.
